prompt: Should I take this trade? GENI is up 18% premarket on an FDA approval, float about 8M, relative volume looks like 6x, price $5.40. It's forming a bull flag near the highs. My account is $8,000 — I'd enter the breakout at $5.50, stop at $5.20, target $6.40. Walk me through whether to take it.

assertions.name: all_five_gates_run
assertions.text: Runs all five gates explicitly and in order (trade-screen, setup-match, trade-planner, state-check, cost-check).

assertions.name: g1_thresholds_applied
assertions.text: Applies concrete G1 thresholds (price ~$1-20, float <10M/<20M, rvol >=5x, catalyst, already moving) to the GENI facts rather than vague approval.

assertions.name: g3_sizer_and_rr
assertions.text: For G3, runs/uses the sizer and reports R:R 3.0 (reward $0.90 / risk $0.30) with a computed share size.

assertions.name: per_gate_verdicts
assertions.text: States a GO/NO-GO (or CANDIDATE/MATCH) verdict for each gate.

assertions.name: all_go_enforced
assertions.text: Makes clear no entry happens unless all gates are GO (enforces the hard rule).

assertions.name: process_not_advice
assertions.text: Frames the output as process/discipline, not a naked buy/sell recommendation or price prediction.
